name: l2_static_airframe_runtime_retune_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRuntimeRetuneReadinessGate combines reviewed config blend suggestions rotational damping evidence and explicit runtime enablement before any static-airframe preset retune can open.
note: Reference surface for runtime preset retune gate.

name: l2_multi_axis_config_blend_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisConfigBlendPolicy supplies capped body-drag and pressure-center suggestions that still need review before runtime mutation.
note: Config suggestion input for runtime readiness.

name: l2_rotational_damping_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRotationalDampingSweepPlan supplies the angular-drag evidence contract and currently marks rotational flow support unavailable.
note: Angular-drag evidence input for runtime readiness.

name: drone_physics_runtime_target
value: DronePhysics is the runtime target for future body-drag pressure-center and angular-drag preset retuning after the gate opens.
note: Runtime target kept unchanged by this audit gate.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live translational and rotational force moment evidence before retuning.
note: Upstream live CFD evidence source.
